name: Plum and Fig Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Seeded raisins, cut into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the figs with hot water and let stand for 10 minutes. Drain.
2. Snip off stems of the figs, then cut them into small pieces.
3. Cut the raisins into thirds.
4. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
5. Place the mixture in a buttered casserole dish.
6. Dot the top with remaining butter.
7. Place the casserole in a pan of hot water.
8. Bake for about 40 minutes in a moderate oven (350°F) until the pudding is set.
9. Serve warm with hard sauce. Serves 6-7.
Source: 48 Family Favorites with California Figs
Reprinted with the permission of The California Fig Advisory Board
